overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a futuristic sports car departing a corporate estate and driving along a palm-lined coastal road at dusk during overcast weather. The vehicle navigates winding turns, passes an NCPD police car, traverses a concrete tunnel, and approaches a security checkpoint, with a neon-lit cyberpunk city skyline visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate estate exit with palm-lined avenue

events.description: futuristic sports car accelerates from stationary position at the corporate gate
passing through the corporate gate onto the main palm-lined road

agents.ego_description: accelerating away from the corporate estate gate onto the wide avenue

entered.detail: large metal gate with illuminated circular tree emblem and vertical slats
tall palm trees lining both sides of the avenue
futuristic high-rise buildings with neon lights visible in the distance
manicured green hedges along the roadside

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a corporate estate gate featuring a prominent tree logo. The futuristic sports car accelerates onto a wide palm-lined avenue, leaving the estate behind. The cyberpunk city skyline is visible in the distance under an overcast dusk sky, with manicured hedges and street lamps lining the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding coastal road with rocky hillside

events.description: overtaking a colorful compact car on the left side of the road
NCPD police car passes in the opposite direction on the left
approaching the tunnel entrance with yellow caution signage

agents.ego_description: navigating winding turns along the coastal road, overtaking slower traffic

notable_agents.action: colorful compact car being overtaken on the left side
NCPD police car driving in the opposite direction with illuminated signage

entered.detail: reddish rocky cliff face with sparse vegetation replacing the hedges
yellow illuminated caution sign above the tunnel entrance

segments.scene_description: The car navigates a winding coastal road bordered by rocky hillsides on the left and guardrails on the right. The driver overtakes a colorful compact car and passes an NCPD police vehicle coming from the opposite direction. The tunnel entrance with its yellow caution sign becomes visible ahead as the road curves through the palm tree-lined route.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete traffic tunnel with linear ceiling lighting

events.description: entering the tunnel, ambient light drops to artificial linear lighting only
approaching tunnel exit, natural daylight becomes visible at the far end

agents.ego_description: maintaining high speed through the straight concrete tunnel

notable_agents.action: distant vehicle visible ahead in the tunnel

entered.detail: smooth grey concrete walls of the traffic tunnel
horizontal fluorescent light strips mounted on the tunnel ceiling

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters the enclosed concrete tunnel, transitioning from natural dusk light to artificial linear lighting. The smooth grey walls flank both sides as the car speeds toward the distant exit where daylight is visible. A vehicle can be seen ahead in the tunnel, and the environment is completely sheltered from the weather.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential checkpoint approach with security barriers

events.description: exiting the tunnel back to the outdoor environment with palm trees
vehicle slows as it approaches the security checkpoint gate

agents.ego_description: exiting the tunnel and approaching the security checkpoint barriers

entered.detail: futuristic security gate with vertical barriers and green holographic signage
concrete walls and fencing marking a residential or restricted zone

segments.scene_description: The car exits the tunnel into the open air, returning to the palm-lined avenue. The vehicle decelerates as it approaches a security checkpoint gate with green holographic displays and vertical barrier arms. The surroundings transition back to the vegetated roadside with residential barriers visible on both sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a futuristic sports car departs a corporate estate and travels through a coastal landscape toward a secure checkpoint. It begins by accelerating away from a corporate gate and its tree logo onto a wide, palm-lined avenue under an overcast dusk sky with a distant city skyline. As the road curves into a winding coastal route, the car navigates between rocky hillsides and guardrails, overtaking a compact car and passing an NCPD police vehicle before approaching a tunnel entrance. The scene then shifts from the natural dusk light into the artificial linear glow of an enclosed concrete tunnel, where the car speeds past grey walls toward a distant exit. Finally, the vehicle emerges back into the open air and decelerates as the environment transitions from the sheltered tunnel to a vegetated roadside featuring a security checkpoint with green holographic displays.
